Cp polynomial coefficient array length 8: [156198.60715, -2209.44267, 12.827544568, -0.037185937665, 5.3810013455e-05, -3.1070889884e-08, 0, 0]. rho polynomial coefficient array length 8: [-5177.3045575, 87.247110819, -0.49471595337, 0.0014140506497, -2.0407934727e-06, 1.1832216776e-09, 0, 0]. 3D CFD resolves viscous and pressure losses directly from the Navier-Stokes solution; no separate Darcy friction-factor input is carried in case_config. Blank two_d_friction_factor_* fields in the contract mean the reduced comparison table did not publish those derived factors, not that 3D friction is zero. two_d_* and one_d_stage* columns are comparison-contract enrichment fields from the cross-model publication table; they describe 2D/1D reference scenarios, not native 3D solver switches.
